zoning_excerpt: Single-family residential district. No retail storefronts. Off-street parking required for dwellings with more than two units.
Neighborhood commercial. Retail and personal services permitted. Residential uses prohibited above ground floor except by special permit.
Light industrial. Manufacturing and warehousing allowed. No schools or daycare centers.
Mixed-use overlay. Ground floor may be commercial or office; upper floors residential. Shared parking may satisfy minimums if approved.
Multifamily residential. Three to six stories. Ground-floor cafe allowed only if accessory to building.
Open space and recreation. Public parks and trails; temporary event structures with permit. No permanent dwellings.
General commercial. Restaurants, clinics, and small offices permitted. No heavy manufacturing.
Planned unit development. Master plan allows cluster housing plus one neighborhood grocery not exceeding 5000 sq ft.
